context: Evaluates the agent's ability to identify and fix agent-specific tool name references (portability violations), rewrite using agent-neutral phrasing, run an audit, and enforce audit artefact hygiene by excluding .context/ paths from git.

checklist.name: No agent-specific names
checklist.description: No agent-specific tool names (e.g. amp, cursor, copilot) appear in generated skill content

checklist.name: Agent-neutral phrasing
checklist.description: Agent-neutral phrasing used throughout (e.g. 'the agent', 'the assistant', not a named tool)

checklist.name: Context path exclusion
checklist.description: Audit output paths (.context/audits/, .context/plans/, .context/analysis/) explicitly excluded from git commits

checklist.name: Ephemeral artefact warning
checklist.description: User reminded that audit artefacts are ephemeral and should not be committed
